programme.title: A Prayer For Compassion
programme.desc: An inspirational documentary about the importance of expanding your circle of compassion in life.

programme.title: Let's Take It Outside Ep102: The Happiest Country on the Planet – Costa Rica (Part 1)
programme.desc: Costa Rica is coined the happiest country on the planet; it’s a place where your fishing dreams often can come true. In this episode, Misty is targeting her ‘bucket list’ fish Roosterfish, and you won’t believe their rare Whale experience.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep110: Bull Sharks in Cancun, Mexico + Sharks Electrosensory Systems
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with Bull Sharks in Cancun, Mexico and analyzes shark's electrosensory systems.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure Ep113: Breaking Barriers - Kayaking China (Part 1)
programme.desc: In this first part of a two part journey, American adventurers embark on a trip of a lifetime to explore the uncharted watershed of China's Sichuan province and to experience the different cultures China has to offer.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure Ep114: Breaking Barriers - Kayaking China (Part 2)
programme.desc: Part two of the journey reveals another part of the reason the American adventurers came to China. To be ambassadors for the sport of kayaking.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep115: Aquabike World Championship Series - Qingdao, China (Part 2)
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Haier Grand Prix continues in Qingdao, China, and features the Aquabike Freestyle and Runabout Divisions.

programme.title: Blue World Ep807: Cave Drift Dive + Triple Wreck Dive
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bird dives a famous, and extremely dangerous, cave in Florida known as Friedman Sink, where divers exit at "Catfish Hotel". Then Blue World heads to the Florida coast where the team explores three shipwrecks on a single dive.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep207: Navigating Montreal’s historic Lachine Canal – Canada
programme.desc: Water Ways TV host Steven Bull works on some boat upgrades in Quebec before navigating Montreal’s historic Lachine Canal.

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: Argentina Slam
programme.desc: Curtis and Autumn travel to Argentina and catch the Grand Slam of a lifetime!

programme.title: Airtime Ep41: Kayaking The Mighty Rivers of Africa
programme.desc: The world’s top kayakers travel Africa in search of the most dangerous whitewater. Shot over the course of a year, this episode highlights the travel and adventure of world-class kayakers as they embark on a “bigger and better” hunt for the largest waterfalls in a land where emergency services are virtually non-existent.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep601: Paddling Wales – United Kingdom
programme.desc: The Facing Waves team heads to Wales to explore the coast via stand-up paddleboard; surf the legendary Snowdonia inland surf lagoon; and learn the sport of coasteering.

programme.title: Creedlecosm
programme.desc: Volcom presents CreedleCosm, a snowboarding cinematic masterpiece. Starring Mike Rav, Scott Blum, Desiree Melancon, Egan Wint, Seb Picaro, Arthur Longo, Torgeir Bergrem, Pat Moore, Bryan Iguchi, Jadyn Chomlack, Juliette Pelchat, Estelle Pensiero, Jamie Lynn, Alec Majerus and Simon Bannerot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Crosspollution
programme.desc: High voltage shred flick from the Volcom Skateboarding and Snowboarding teams. Starring Benny Milam, Cody Warble, Reid Smith, Lenny Mazzotti, Jack Harold, Scott Blum, Christian Connors, CJ Collins, Axel Cruysberghs, Alec Majerus, Henry Gartland and Mike Ravelson. Edited by Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Inexact Odyssey
programme.desc: ‘Inexact Odyssey’ is a film about unexpected adventure and endless opportunity. From the winding canyons of Zion National Park to the high alpine passes of Arlberg, Austria, filmmaker Seth Huot uses his Super-8 camera to capture spontaneous travels and impromptu sessions with the Volcom Snow team.

programme.title: Pusher Bearings Presents: Tchin Tchin
programme.desc: In ‘Tchin Tchin’, the Pusher Bearings crew head to the South of France to do flip tricks and jump off cliffs. Featuring the skateboarding of Kilian Zehnder, Titi Gormit, Robin Fournier, Anto Lopez, Davide Holznecht, and Simon Perottet.

programme.title: Pusher Bearings Presents: Outta Bounds
programme.desc: Thrasher Magazine and Pusher Bearings present ‘Outta Bounds,’ featuring ledges, hip-hop and skate plazas. Pusher’s international team of technicians knows the recipe. Kilian Zehnder, Nick Dias, Carlos Iqui and more bring the flow from South America to Spain.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Alive In Engadin
programme.desc: Do you like beautiful Swiss valleys? Do you like skateboarding? Yes, and yes. Watch photographer Filip Zuan and cinematographer Christian Taro spend a weekend capturing extraordinary spots with the skateboarders Christoph Rediger and Alessandro Magnani. A feast for the eyes and the senses.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Suscht Guet
programme.desc: SUSCHT GUET is a Swiss skateboard film by Shqipron Bobaj and Tomas Schneider. Featuring Aaron Ulrich, Célian Cordt-Moller, David Nideröst, Dino Brandão, Fabio Prosdocimi, Fin Broder, Flavio Zimmermann, Jànos Herzog, Jeron Breschan, Lorenzo Zuber, Oliver Weismantel, Lukas Bigun, Mike Sidi and more.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Worldly Goods
programme.desc: To celebrate the release of his collection, Louie Lopez spent a week stacking clips between breezy San Francisco and blazing hot Sacramento with a crew of his longtime Volcom teammates; Alec Majerus, Collin Provost, Amos Wilton and Simon Bannerot. Filmed by Ryan Lee, Taylor Phillips and Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Vitals
programme.desc: The Volcom Skate Team putting their latest Vitals Collection to the test in the streets of Los Angeles, California. Featuring Louie Lopez, Collin Provost, Grant Taylor, Axel Cruysberghs, CJ Collins and Chris Pfanner. Filmed by Ryan Lee and Calvin Millar. Edited by Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Que Saguaro
programme.desc: In ‘Que Saguaro’, Volcom charges through the spillways and street spots of the Southwestern U.S. with Milton Martinez, Collin Provost, Omar Hassan, Mathias Torres, Alec Majerus, Simon Bannerot, CJ Collins, Peter Hewitt, Remy Stratton, Tom Remmilard, Jarrod Pimental, Jaime Lynn and Scott Blum.

programme.title: Missle 3
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: The Olin Sisters - Pachamama
programme.desc: A sun-drenched short film about soul, surf and sisterhood. Pachamama follows Mathea and Sanoa Olin’s journey to become professional surfers in the harsh coldwater waves off the west coast of Canada. Filmed by director Ross Allen during The Rip Curl Pro Tofino.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Happy Recluse
programme.desc: For many years Pete Devries and Jeremy Koreski have been on a mission to surf the best waves Vancouver Island has to offer. In particular, they return again and over to a wave with potential for a legendary session. In the process, Pete tells of his life as a ”Happy Recluse," at home in cold water.

programme.title: Roxy Presents: New Colors
programme.desc: Faced with the winter waters of Norway, four female professional surfers step out of their comfort zone, push their boundaries and redefine their approach to surfing. Beyond competition sites, they reconnect with the pleasure of sharing their passion through a unique cold water experience.

programme.title: Billabong Presents: The Cape
programme.desc: What happens when good winds, good weather, and a solid swell come together along one of the rawest stretches of coastline on the planet? You don't stop. Surfers Taj Burrow, Shaun Manners, Jaleesa Vincent, and Matt Bromley test their staying power on this Adventure Division strike mission.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: The Backyard
programme.desc: At Pipeline there is flora, fauna, ocean and stone. Volcom Stone. At this point, the Volcom house is practically part of the reef. Between the team, the family, the legacy, the peanut gallery, the respect, the Pipe Pro and the barbecues, you’d be hard pressed not to notice Volcom on the North Shore.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: XO - Coco Ho
programme.desc: Step into the world of pro surfer Coco Ho. Raised on Oahu’s North Shore, the film explores how Ho got started in the water, her surfing family history, and the ups and downs of the Championship Tour. Featuring brother Mason Ho, father Michael Ho, and surfers John John Florence and Stephanie Gilmore.

programme.title: Kaiwi Winds
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Tweakin' On Boards With Ryan Burch
programme.desc: Tweakin’ on Boards was shot in 2009. Seems like a second ago and forever ago. Truth is it’s both. As a surfer and filmmaker, Burch isn’t content complaining everything's already been done. Says fellow surfer Cyrus Sutton, “He needs to FEEL history for himself.” This film is that and more.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Fly over Norway’s stunning landscapes, from the winding Atlantic Ocean Road to the snow-covered fjords. Experience the beauty of Bud Village and the famous Trollstigen, with calming music and the pure sounds of nature enhancing the tranquil journey.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Night Sky
programme.desc: While there are many ways to spend time, nothing compares to the calming effect of watching a starry sky. Stand on a hilltop, admire the Milky Way, and experience peaceful serenity.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Wildlife
programme.desc: Explore Botswana’s wild landscapes, witnessing lions, giraffes, elephants, and vibrant birdlife in Chobe National Park, and experience thrilling hunts and the beauty of Africa’s nature.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Audi R8 Spyder is the most extreme convertible by the German brand. Also: the Ferrari California T scores with Italian passion and elegant lines. And: AMG's GT C Roadster with its roaring sound is a real bad boy with a touch of luxury.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Suzuki's all-rounder flagship, the V-Strom, underwent a rejuvenation treatment. Will the new V-Strom 650 be able to surpass its versatile predecessors? Also: does the use of carbon make sense in the manufacturing of motorcycles? And: a bike tour on the Deutsche Alpenstraße, the German Alpine Road, in the footsteps of Bavaria's fairy tale king Ludwig II.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The big KTM 990 Adventure is Austria’s answer to BMW's bestselling R 1200 GS. Is KTM's allrounder for streets, gravel roads and long distance travels a worthy opponent for the dominating Bavarian bike? Also: travel enduros are put to the test as we accompany two German adventurers on their 31-day, 5800-kilometre bike tour through Thailand, Laos and Cambodia.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Audi RS7 Performance's V8 engine propels this limousine to a top speed of more than 300 km/h. Also: the Maserati Ghibli combines Italian elegance with impressive performance. And: a look at the second generation Porsche Panamera.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Lamborghini Huracán Spyder, the Pagani Huayra and Ferrari's 488 Spider don't just look good. Once these super sports cars unleash their power, there is no stopping them. We took a look at these contenders, their features and performance.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is known as the toughest speedway in the world. Together with race driver Hans-Joachim Stuck we take a look at the history of this iconic race track as well as the events and record attempts that have been taking place there.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: What are the characteristics of a typical German car? Do stereotypes like functionality, reliability but also a certain dullness paint a realistic picture? Also, we explored if the Volkswagen Golf GTE could bring new impulses to the brand's model range.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Station Wagons like the Volvo V60 Polestar aren't just family vans anymore but basically very roomy sports cars. Mercedes followed a more luxurious approach with their E43 AMG T model. And: the ultimate powerhouse station wagon, the Audi RS6.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Even though the Mercedes-AMG A45 Performmaster has just four cylinders, its sound is similar to its V8-colleagues by AMG. Also: the car tuning company MTM offers a similarly powerful alternative, based on an Audi: the RS3 R.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: Of what used to be more than 300 tractor manufacturers, only three remain in Germany today. One of them is Deutz. We show the change in tractor construction from the simple tractor to the all-rounder at this traditional company.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: The Fiat 500X, SUV offshoot of the popular 500, is built in Melfi. The plant is one of the most modern in Europe. The FCA Group has invested almost one billion euros in the expansion. Up to 1600 vehicles roll off the production line here every day.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.desc: On Put Your Car On TV, car fans from the Middle East can have their darlings rated in terms of speed, style and sound. Included this time: a Nova SS, a special Honda Accord and a car clad in crystals.

programme.title: The Night Before Christmas
programme.desc: Well, a mouse *is* stirring... And he's having fun playing with the toys, until he mistakes Tom for a stuffed toy and wakes him up

programme.desc: Ms.Mary leaves whiplash in charge of the plantation while she goes into the jungle alone searching for her father, unaware Clutch was on his way to help!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the 2021 GC32 Racing Tour. You are about to see all of the foiling action from Lagos on Portugal's beautiful Algarve! As usual, on the GC32 Racing Tour each venue has been selected to provide the best conditions for the nimble GC32s to fly at 30+ knots speeds. But - spoiler alert... in this episode you'll see them racing at almost 40 knots! Lagos is once more in the center of the sailing universe with the GC32 Lagos Cup 2. Appropriately coinciding with the Olympic Games, the event included some of the sailing's leading names, including several multiple Olympic medallists.

programme.title: La Ruta de la Sal - Ruta de la Sal 2023
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: The Smoke that Thunders
programme.desc: In 1855, the Scottish explorer David Livingstone named the Victoria Falls after his reigning queen. However, the Kalolo-Lozi people had their own name for it: Mosi-oa-Tunya, “the smoke that thunders”.Staring down into the depths of the mighty Zambezi River from the top of the world’s largest waterfall, the Victoria Falls, world-class divers Orlando Duque and Jonathan Paredes prepare for the most challenging dive of their lives.Be part of their adventure as they dive into the largest waterfall in the world in The Smoke that Thunders, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Tidal
programme.desc: Tidal follows the journey of Lisa Beasley. After she suffered a horrible BASE jumping accident, she struggles to return to the ocean, but ends convincing herself to venture back into the water. Lisa’s journey begins with a childhood love of water and sea life. Lucky of surviving the accident, she must now face an immense recovery period that brings her closer to her mother as well as her first love: the sea.As Lisa struggles to find an exercise she can handle, she starts discovering the beauty surrounding Cape Town’s ocean. The tidal pools in particular became very meaningful to Lisa’s recovery, and she must now work to protect them from the harmful historical cleaning protocols that kill the marine life she has come to love.Watch Lisa’s inspirational transformation and realisation of the beauty of the ocean in this impactful documentary that reminds us of the importance of self-recovery and reconnection with the ocean. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4
programme.desc: Vodice is a famous tourist destination known for many breathtaking beaches and vibrant and rich offer of all tourist attractions. It is known for its liveliness and its friendly hosts. Located on the coast in a wide bay, 11 km northwest ofŠibenik, it is the ideal vacation spot for everyone. Check it out in this episode of Sail-ho Croatia!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5
programme.desc: The region of Imotski is a historical name for the area. We are determined in today's episode to visit this region and a town straight out of a fairytale - magical Imotski. programme.title: When God Says Let Go

programme.title: Running For A Reason
programme.desc: Our expectation of God must not be that there will never be anything chasing us in life but that we are chosen while we are chased. programme.title: The Facts Aren't Final

programme.title: God Can Use This Too

programme.title: The Prayer That Repairs
programme.desc: Don’t be so confused about the noise around you that you can’t hear the God who made you. When you’re faced with a struggle you didn’t see coming, remember that Jesus is already praying for you, and His prayer is stronger than any attack.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Disguised as a doctor, Nacho visits Azalea in the clinic ready to disconnect her from the equipment that keeps her alive.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila and her mother, in an emotional encounter, unite in an embrace longed for so many years. Many questions for Rosa who justifies herself by telling her that her intention was always to protect her and prevent her from being contaminated with hatred and resentment as she feels. Marcelina wanders around a park in a daze, unbalanced and nervous, after learning of her betrayal.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila and Rosa swear that now nothing and no one can separate them. Rosa wants to be reunited with her sister, Mother Isabel. Rosa, alone with her sister, shows her true face: cold, calm and above all vengeful. The two sisters confront each other over what they want for Camila.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max now understands why Camila did not marry him. Max and Camila meet with Rosa. Rosa Blanco and Fausto plan to ally themselves to bring down Ezequiel, but he does not trust her and thinks it is a trap for him and so he decides to ally himself with Ezequiel, with the purpose of murdering Rosa.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Pedro promises Gertrudis that the job will be done that night, but in his own way: with a lethal injection. Ricardo begins to entangle himself in his own web with María Bonita and seems to forget his goal: to discover the woman who cashed his mother's check. Virginia does the math and realizes she is late on her menstrual period. Gertrudis tries to excite Patricia to win over Alberto.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Guillermo knows that Lorena will not kill the lawyer and before she confesses everything to Alberto, he asks Pedro to let him kill the lawyer and his son Alberto. Pedro demands that he manipulate her one more time with the child to force her to do it. Paulina is certain that it was María Balbina who stole the blank check from his wallet.

programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Mucha confusión en Camila, nada justifica las mentiras y cada vez Camila está más decepcionada de los engaños de la Madre Isabel. Ezequiel confronta a Julia y agrede salvajemente a Gregorio al encontrarlos juntos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel confiesa a Camila pero la muchacha sabe que aún miente. Jeli, su hermanita, sufre por la irresponsabilidad de Fernando, que la embarazó. Max anuncia a Marcelina y Astrid que pronto se casará con Camila.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto contrata a Antón, un delincuente, para asesinar a Rosa Blanco; Camila y Max, felices, cuentan al Padre Tiziano, sobre su próxima boda. Acompañados de Luciano, citan a Rosa en una concurrida calle, pero ella no aparece. Mientras, Sebastián y Julia, Amelia y Gregorio, en sus respectivas casas, comparten tristezas.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante una llamada telefónica de Rosa Blanco a Luciano, Camila, ilusionada, quiere hablar con su mamá. El Capitán Torrealba la ayude a entender los secretos que existen sobre el crimen. Ante la brutal agresión a Sebastián, Ezequiel quiere vengarla con Fernando, un Aragón.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia y María Amelia habían denunciado el crimen de la muerte de Leoncio. Torrealba las enfrenta pues quiere saber cómo fue que Rosa mató a Leoncio. Patricia, desesperada, bebe sin freno. Ante su descontrol, el detective, capcioso, duda de ella.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En las cartas que entregó Henry a Max, Rosa Blanco dice que le arrebataron a su hija y Camila, muy ansiosa, cree que, al fin sabrá por qué su mamá la abandonó. Marcelina encuentra la caja con las cartas y al saber el contenido, alterada, ordena que las quemen.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Vigilia
programme.desc: Santiago amanece desnudo y golpeado en medio del desierto. El joven se incorpora muy aturdido y retorna a su casa paterna.

programme.title: El Secuestro
programme.desc: Un joven con talento en la música sueña con ser un gran artista hasta que conoce al hijo de un poderoso narcotraficante colombiano quién promete ayudarlo a cambio de que trabaje para ellos. El joven no se imagina en que mundo se está metiendo. La fama le costará lo que más ama.

programme.title: El Duende
programme.desc: Rosalía se muda a la ciudad junto a su hijo pequeño, Ramiro. Con la ayuda de una conocida, consigue encontrar vivienda. La casa ha estado cerrada por décadas, y tiene un horno antiguo. Lo que Rosalía ignora es que dentro del horno habita un duende que tiene por costumbre robar niños.

programme.title: 4 Metros
programme.desc: 4 METROS relata, en tono de comedia romántica, la historia de un hombre entrando en la crisis de los 40. Joaquín tiene un zumbido en los oídos y poco sabe de sí mismo. Se ha dejado llevar sin intervenir demasiado en sus deseos. No escucha su voz interior. Su vida afectiva y laboral no tienen rumbo. El zumbido quizá sea la expresión, no asumida ni entendida todavía, de un ruido metafórico de la vida gritándole por dónde ir. Su novia tiene 20 años menos, aparece la presión social y familiar sobre la paternidad, sentirse útil, la vocación, el trabajo y cómo ser feliz. Hasta que otra mujer irrumpe y todo parece acomodarse. Pero siempre el orden debe ser interno. Así, como si el destino tomara la palabra, su vida cambiará 4 metros abajo del agua, donde aparece un sendero para encontrar la identidad.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: El Secuestro
programme.desc: Un joven con talento en la música sueña con ser un gran artista hasta que conoce al hijo de un poderoso narcotraficante colombiano quién promete ayudarlo a cambio de que trabaje para ellos. El joven no se imagina en que mundo se está metiendo. La fama le costará lo que más ama.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
